violations.text: Raw animal foods (chicken and beef) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (prepared cold sauces) in the two door slide refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/22/2025

Walk in Refrigerator was observed held at 53 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food items observed at 53DF - Beef, Cheese, Fish, yogurt, Deli Meat, Bacon, Hamburgers, Sauces, Chicken, milk, Yogurt Drink, and feta cheese all voluntarily disposed of. Establishment is to limit size of orders, needing to maintain adequate refrigeration until walk in cooler is repaired. Repair technician scheduled for 12/22/25. New Violation. Correct By: 12/22/2025

Desserts packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/18/2025
Food items were observed stored on the floor in the kitchen. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/22/2025

Staff were observed not wearing hair restraints. Food employees must wear hair restraints such as hats, hair coverings, or nets that are worn to effectively keep their hair from contacting exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, linens, and unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. New Violation. Correct By: 12/22/2025
Refrigerator door gasket was observed in poor repair on the walk in cooler. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2026

No hot water was available at time of inspection. Establishment hot water tank is not functioning. Establishment is to heat water on stove for use in three bay sink. Establishment is to make needed repairs to hot water tank. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2025

Raw animal foods (beef) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (pastry) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Pastry (cheesecake) was adulterated and voluntarily disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2025

Chicken was observed held at 121 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Chicken was voluntarily disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2025

Various pastry items packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 12/18/2025
Gaskets located on the prep unit in the back are not in good repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/11/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the refrigeration units have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be maintained. New Violation. Correct By: 12/12/2025

No hot water was available at time of inspection. Establishment hot water tank is not functioning. Establishment is to heat water on stove for use in three bay sink. Establishment is to make needed repairs to hot water tank. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2025
The floor by the cooking line is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/08/2025
Hot water was not available at 3 bay sink. Hot water only reached 90DF. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/04/2025

The walk in cooler was observed held at 44 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. New Violation. Correct By: 09/02/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the gaskets, and behind the cooking line have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 09/02/2025
No hot water was available during time of inspection. Hot water must be readily available. New Violation. Correct By: 09/02/2025
The ceiling in the kitchen area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/02/2025
The floor by the grill line is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2025
